name: Bacalhau à Brás
description: A classic Portuguese dish of shredded salt cod with eggs, thin-cut fried potatoes, and olives.

recipeInstructions.text: Soak the salt cod in cold water for 24 hours, changing the water 3–4 times. Drain, remove skin and bones, and shred finely.
Heat olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Sauté the onion and garlic until soft and golden, about 8 minutes.
Add the shredded cod and stir well. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the straw potatoes and toss to combine. Pour in the beaten eggs and stir continuously over low heat until just set but still creamy.
Season with pepper (salt is usually not needed). Garnish with black olives and parsley. Serve immediately.

notes.title: Tip
notes.text: The eggs should be barely cooked — remove from heat while still slightly runny as they continue to cook from residual heat.
